title: WarsiteCraft Pack
description: A set of mods for playing on the WarsiteCraft server.
body:
A set of mods for playing on the Warsite_Craft server.

The following mods are available in this modpack:

1) Timeless and Classics Zero, which adds a huge variety of weapons.

2) Timeless and Classics Guns: LesRaisins Append Pack that complements Timeless and Classics Zero.

3) HT's TreeChop for a variety of wood chopping.

4) ItemPhysic, which adds a very realistic behavior of objects, which is very beautiful.

5) CreativeCore is a must-have mod for ItemPhysic.

6) Create, which adds a variety of mechanisms that are very important on the server, just as easily diversify your game.

7) Create Big Cannons, an addition to Create that will add huge guns that dominate the server in terms of destructive power!

8) Create Crafts & Additions, complements Create and diversify your survival with electricity, will add batteries.

9) Create: New Age, as well as an addition to Create, which adds even more extensive possibilities for interacting with electricity.

10) A Corpse that will secure players' belongings when they die, as well as show the coordinates of death.

11) Botarium is a must-have supplement for Create: New Age. 
   However, you can try it yourself and then you will definitely find out everything.
